//: Emit config for the published dist. Compiles the library source (src/) AND the three canonical root source folders (shaders/, images/, composites/) in one pass with rootDir '.', so each tree emits under dist/ preserving its layout: src/ -> dist/src/, shaders/<name> -> dist/shaders/<name>, images/<category> -> dist/images/<category>, composites/<name> -> dist/composites/<name>. rootDir is '.' (not src/) because the root folders live OUTSIDE src/ and src/ imports them for types; a src-only rootDir would emit those imported files in place next to the source. The exports map points the '.' entry and the src-derived subpaths at dist/src/..., and the per-item subpaths at dist/<folder>/.... The package is type:commonjs, so the dist must be real CommonJS, not ESM-syntax .js under a CJS type (which webpack and node import()/require() reject). The editor/typecheck config (tsconfig.json) stays ESM/bundler; this only governs `bun run build`. Metro consumers resolve src/*.ts directly and never see this output.
